name: Milan Mendpara
title: Mobile App Developer & IT Business Owner
about: I am a seasoned Mobile App Developer and IT professional with over 10 years of experience building and scaling high-performance iOS and Android applications. As the owner of my IT business in Ahmedabad, I specialize in end-to-end development, from MVP creation to deploying complex enterprise systems like DealerClick DMS and specialized community platforms like SteepleMate. I focus on delivering clean, scalable code and high-end tech aesthetics.

jobs.description: Led the development of over 50 mobile applications across various domains including automotive, education, and religious management. Specialized in technical architecture, cross-platform migrations, and real-time streaming.

items.title: SteepleMate
items.description: A comprehensive mobile platform for church and religious community management, featuring member interaction and giving.

items.title: NumbersBee
items.description: An interactive educational mobile application designed to improve number sense through live-streaming matches and practice modules.

items.title: DealerClick DMS
items.description: A robust Dealership Management System for the automotive industry, allowing real-time inventory and lead management.
